overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, covered walkways, and bustling urban intersections. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's detailed Night City environment with wet reflective streets and dense neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with hotel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered pedestrian zone beneath a hotel sign, passing cherry blossom trees with pink lighting

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated hotel sign with Japanese characters and purple neon lighting
wide concrete staircase leading up to building entrance with metal railings
trees with pink illuminated blossoms lining the street
large suspended digital billboard displaying advertisements above the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city at night. A prominent hotel sign glows with purple neon on the right, while cherry blossom trees with artificial pink lighting line the left side. The camera moves forward past concrete stairs, following a pedestrian in a white jacket through the semi-covered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass tunnel with red neon lighting

events.description: enters covered underpass with red neon wall lighting and digital advertising screens
ambient lighting shifts to dominant red and orange neon tones from wall-mounted light strips

agents.ego_description: walking through a tunnel-like underpass with graffiti-covered walls and illuminated advertising displays

notable_agents.action: person standing near the wall on the right side of the tunnel

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with geometric paneling and linear fluorescent lights
vertical strips of warm red and orange neon lighting mounted on tunnel walls
large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements on the tunnel wall
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow underpass tunnel characterized by red neon lighting and graffiti-covered walls. Digital advertising screens illuminate the concrete corridor as the camera moves forward. The environment shifts from the open covered walkway to an enclosed urban tunnel with artificial lighting.

events.description: exits tunnel into open city intersection with tall skyscrapers and neon signage
crossing the street at yellow crosswalk while vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing a wide wet street at a major intersection, navigating between moving vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: green car driving through the intersection ahead of the camera
pedestrian crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows towering over the intersection
large vertical neon signs and holographic advertisements on building facades
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
ground floor commercial spaces with illuminated storefronts

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a vast urban intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon signage. The camera crosses the wet street at a yellow crosswalk, navigating through moderate traffic including a green car. The open plaza reveals the dense cyberpunk cityscape with holographic advertisements and illuminated buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with building entrance stairs

events.description: turns toward building entrance and begins ascending wide concrete staircase
climbing stairs toward entrance with blue neon trim and digital signage

agents.ego_description: ascending a wide concrete staircase toward a building entrance with blue neon lighting, passing other pedestrians on the steps

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple flights leading up to building entrance
bright blue neon light strips outlining the building entrance canopy
small outdoor food cart with umbrella and neon lighting
mature trees in circular planters providing greenery to the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a building entrance featuring a wide concrete staircase illuminated by striking blue neon trim. The camera ascends the steps through an urban plaza area with food vendors and trees, moving toward the entrance while passing other pedestrians. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights, maintaining the cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered walkway into a vast, open cyberpunk intersection. It begins on a covered pedestrian path, moving past purple hotel signage and artificial pink cherry blossoms while following a pedestrian in a white jacket. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into an enclosed underpass tunnel defined by red neon lighting, graffiti-covered walls, and glowing digital advertisements. The camera then emerges from the tunnel into a wide urban plaza, crossing a wet yellow crosswalk amidst towering skyscrapers and holographic displays. Finally, the movement leads toward a building entrance, ascending a concrete staircase accented with striking blue neon trim as the wet pavement reflects the surrounding city lights.
